proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets=0.

analyses.result_summary: Welch t-test of pfs_months by stage_iv: mean 3.617 (stage_iv=1) vs 5.153 (stage_iv=0); diff=-1.536, p=0.00e+00.
Welch t-test of pfs_months by has_brain_mets: mean 3.750 (yes) vs 4.800 (no); diff=-1.050, p=1.45e-178.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Linear regression pfs_months ~ ecog_ps: slope=-1.180 months per ECOG point, p=0.00e+00. Group means: {'0': 5.639645623860161, '1': 4.444136464573715, '2': 3.2885045502064334}.
Linear regression pfs_months ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo: slope=-0.0747 per percent, p=4.07e-148. Tertile means: {'low': 4.970908616320614, 'mid': 4.746528053673822, 'high': 4.356095137314955}.

proposed_hypotheses.text: er_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than er_positive=0.
pr_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than pr_positive=0.
her2_positive=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than her2_positive=0.
her2_low=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than her2_low=0.

analyses.result_summary: er_positive: mean PFS 4.865 vs 4.297; diff=+0.568, p=3.70e-143.
pr_positive: mean PFS 4.824 vs 4.462; diff=+0.362, p=5.82e-59.
her2_positive: mean PFS 4.317 vs 4.776; diff=-0.459, p=6.10e-70.
her2_low: mean PFS 4.765 vs 4.650; diff=+0.114, p=1.04e-06.

proposed_hypotheses.text: brca1_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca1_mutation=0.
brca2_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0.
pik3ca_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation=0.

analyses.result_summary: brca1_mutation: mean PFS 4.669 vs 4.694; diff=-0.024, p=7.24e-01 — null.
brca2_mutation: mean PFS 4.569 vs 4.696; diff=-0.127, p=8.13e-02 — null.
pik3ca_mutation: mean PFS 4.328 vs 4.887; diff=-0.559, p=6.07e-144.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: linregress pfs ~ ki67_pct: slope=-0.0188 mo per %, p=2.98e-93, r=-0.091.
linregress pfs ~ albumin_g_dl: slope=+0.499 mo per g/dL, p=9.39e-112, r=+0.100.
linregress pfs ~ ldh_u_l: slope=-0.00051 mo per U/L, p=2.45e-04, r=-0.016.
linregress pfs ~ age_years: slope=+0.1759 mo per year, p=0.00e+00, r=+0.702. Direction is positive (older = longer PFS) in this cohort, contrary to prior expectation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all features and treatments simultaneously, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, ecog_ps, her2_positive, pik3ca_mutation, ki67_pct, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and ldh_u_l independently shorten pfs_months, while er_positive, age_years, and albumin_g_dl independently lengthen it.
After adjustment, treatment_palbociclib has a positive coefficient on pfs_months while the other treatments have null coefficients.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs ~ all features+treatments (R^2=0.792). Independent effects with p<1e-6: stage_iv (coef=-1.5488, p=0.0e+00); has_brain_mets (coef=-0.9833, p=0.0e+00); er_positive (coef=+0.5316, p=8.6e-275); her2_positive (coef=-0.4708, p=2.4e-239); pik3ca_mutation (coef=-0.5815, p=0.0e+00); treatment_palbociclib (coef=+1.1011, p=0.0e+00); ecog_ps (coef=-1.1715, p=0.0e+00); age_years (coef=+0.1757, p=0.0e+00); ki67_pct (coef=-0.0189, p=0.0e+00); albumin_g_dl (coef=+0.4755, p=0.0e+00); ldh_u_l (coef=-0.0005, p=2.2e-16); weight_loss_pct_6mo (coef=-0.0768, p=0.0e+00). Treatment coefs: treatment_tamoxifen=-0.008(p=0.48), treatment_palbociclib=+1.101(p=0), treatment_trastuzumab=-0.009(p=0.47), treatment_olaparib=-0.026(p=0.12), treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=+0.033(p=0.049), treatment_pembrolizumab=-0.020(p=0.17)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_palbociclib=0 in the overall cohort.
The other five treatments (tamoxifen, trastuzumab, olaparib, sacituzumab_govitecan, pembrolizumab) have small or null overall effects on pfs_months when assessed univariately.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate Welch t-test: treatment_palbociclib treated mean 5.408 vs untreated 4.310; diff=+1.098, p=0.00e+00.

Univariate Welch t-tests, each treatment vs untreated overall: treatment_tamoxifen: diff=+0.0431 mo (p=0.077); treatment_palbociclib: diff=+1.0981 mo (p=0); treatment_trastuzumab: diff=-0.0605 mo (p=0.029); treatment_olaparib: diff=-0.0363 mo (p=0.33); treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan: diff=-0.0073 mo (p=0.85); treatment_pembrolizumab: diff=-0.0741 mo (p=0.018). Only palbociclib reaches a clinically meaningful effect; the others are within ~0.1 mo of null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_palbociclib is larger in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 patients (positive interaction).
The pfs_months benefit from treatment_palbociclib is smaller (or reversed) in her2_positive=1 patients than in her2_positive=0 patients (negative interaction).
The pfs_months benefit from treatment_palbociclib is smaller in pik3ca_mutation=1 patients than in pik3ca_mutation=0 patients (negative interaction).
The pfs_months benefit from treatment_palbociclib is larger in pr_positive=1 patients than in pr_positive=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS with covariates: palbociclib x er_positive interaction coef=+1.559 (p=0.00e+00). Effect in ER+: +1.577 mo; in ER-: -0.017 mo.
OLS with covariates: palbociclib x her2_positive interaction coef=-1.338 (p=0.00e+00). Effect in HER2+: -0.014; in HER2-: +1.350.
OLS with covariates: palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation interaction coef=-1.665 (p=0.00e+00). Effect in PIK3CA-mut: +0.036; in PIK3CA-wt: +1.659.
OLS with covariates: palbociclib x pr_positive interaction coef=+1.029 (p=0.00e+00). Effect in PR+: +1.491; in PR-: +0.399.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_palbociclib decreases as ki67_pct increases (negative interaction with ki67_pct).

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction palbociclib x z(ki67_pct), adjusted: coef per SD=-0.647 (p=0.00e+00). Tertile-stratified palbo effects: low Ki67 1.8633004754494182, mid 1.4382132559234808, high -0.005038682196025768.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_trastuzumab is larger in her2_positive=1 patients than in her2_positive=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS trastuzumab x her2_positive interaction coef=+0.022 (p=0.5). Subgroup: HER2+ palbo effect=-0.079 (p=0.15, n_t=1890); HER2- effect=-0.051 (p=0.1). Interaction is null — trastuzumab does not show the clinically expected enrichment in HER2+ patients in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_olaparib is larger in brca1_mutation=1 patients than in brca1_mutation=0 patients (positive interaction).
The pfs_months benefit from treatment_olaparib is larger in brca2_mutation=1 patients than in brca2_mutation=0 patients (positive interaction).
The pfs_months benefit from treatment_olaparib is larger in patients with brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1 than in BRCA-wild-type patients.

analyses.result_summary: OLS olaparib x brca1_mutation interaction coef=+0.079 (p=0.48). BRCA1+ subgroup olaparib effect=+0.398 (p=0.12, n_t=120).
OLS olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction coef=-0.045 (p=0.69). BRCA2+ subgroup olaparib effect=+0.295 (p=0.19, n_t=119).

Subgroup test: BRCA1+ or BRCA2+ olaparib effect=+0.346 (p=0.041, n_t=239); BRCA-wt effect=-0.056 (p=0.14). Adjusted-interaction test (BRCA-any) inter_coef=+0.044 (p=0.59) — adjusted interaction not significant; raw subgroup difference is borderline.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in triple-negative patients (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0) than in non-TNBC patients.
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months in TNBC patients with high ki67_pct (above median).

analyses.result_summary: TNBC subgroup pembrolizumab effect=+0.072 (p=0.22, n_t=1578); ER+ effect=-0.111 (p=0.0048). The TNBC-specific effect is small and not significant.

TNBC + high Ki67 subgroup pembrolizumab effect=-0.086 (p=0.28, n_t=853). Null. Confirmed by TNBC + brain_mets (-0.089, p=0.63) and TNBC + high Ki67 + high LDH (-0.043, p=0.69). No positive subgroup detected for pembrolizumab.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is larger in has_brain_mets=1 patients than in has_brain_mets=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS sacit x has_brain_mets interaction coef=+0.238 (p=2.91e-05). Brain mets subgroup sacit effect=+0.162 (p=0.18, n_t=490); no brain mets effect=-0.030. Adjusted-interaction confirmation (controls for other treatments and major covariates): inter_coef=+0.237 (p=3.17e-05). Sacituzumab benefit is concentrated in brain-mets patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit from treatment_tamoxifen is larger in er_positive=1 than in er_positive=0 patients.
Among er_positive=1 patients, the tamoxifen pfs_months benefit is larger in postmenopausal=1 than in postmenopausal=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: OLS tamoxifen x er_positive interaction coef=+0.031 (p=0.21). ER+ subgroup tam effect=+0.023 (p=0.45); HR- effect=+0.080. No ER-enriched benefit.
ER+ premeno tam effect=+0.044 (p=0.38); ER+ postmeno effect=+0.010 (p=0.81). Both null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the joint subgroup defined by er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases pfs_months by more than 2 months relative to no palbociclib.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup analysis: ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt palbociclib treated mean PFS 7.209 vs untreated 4.300; diff=+2.908 mo (p=0, n_t=6571, n_u=12110). Adjusted-interaction confirmation: inter_coef=+2.923 (p=0); palbo effect at non-subgroup is essentially 0 (+0.003). Palbociclib benefit is almost entirely concentrated in this subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adding pr_positive=1 to ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt further increases the palbociclib pfs_months benefit.

Within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/PR+ patients, restricting to low ki67_pct (below median) further increases the palbociclib pfs_months benefit, identifying a luminal-A-like subgroup with the maximal effect.

analyses.result_summary: ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/PR+ palbociclib effect: diff=+2.946 mo (p=0, n_t=5595, n_u=10321). Adding PR+ increases effect from +2.91 to +2.95 mo.

ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/PR+/low Ki67 (<median) palbociclib effect: diff=+5.010 mo (p=0, n_t=2798, n_u=5119). Adding low Ki67 increases effect from +2.95 to +5.01 mo. This is the maximally refined positive subgroup. Complement subgroup palbo effect=+0.350 mo (p=3.7e-48) — small residual benefit outside subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within has_brain_mets=1 patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan benefit on pfs_months is concentrated in patients with low ki67_pct (below median).

analyses.result_summary: Brain mets + low Ki67 sacit effect: diff=+0.433 mo (p=0.025, n_t=239, n_u=2341). Adjusted-interaction (brain_mets & low_ki67) inter_coef=+0.304 (p=0.00017). The sacituzumab benefit concentrates in brain-mets patients with low Ki67.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 2- or 3-feature binary subgroup exists in which treatment_trastuzumab significantly increases pfs_months by more than 0.5 months.

analyses.result_summary: Exhaustive search over 2- and 3-feature binary subgroups (min n_t=150) for trastuzumab. Top |diff| subgroups: ['brca2', 'pik3ca_wt']: diff=-0.509 (p=0.02, n_t=167); ['brain_mets', 'premeno', 'high_alb']: diff=+0.405 (p=0.032, n_t=238); ['pik3ca_wt', 'stage_iv', 'brain_mets']: diff=+0.391 (p=0.043, n_t=203); ['brain_mets', 'postmeno', 'low_ki67']: diff=-0.362 (p=0.022, n_t=327); ['brca2', 'stage_lt4']: diff=-0.346 (p=0.093, n_t=169). The largest subgroup-level diff is well below 0.5 mo and the directions are mixed; multiple-testing correction would render none significant. No reliable trastuzumab-responsive subgroup is identified.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Beyond the BRCA-mutated subgroup, an additional 2-/3-feature binary subgroup exists where treatment_olaparib substantially increases pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Exhaustive 2-/3-feature search for olaparib (min n_t=150). Top |diff| rows are predominantly negative (suggesting harm in HER2+/PIK3CA-mutated/brain-mets non-BRCA subsets): ['pr_pos', 'brain_mets', 'low_ki67']: diff=-0.566 (p=0.014, n_t=163); ['pr_pos', 'her2_pos', 'pik3ca']: diff=-0.489 (p=0.0022, n_t=213); ['er_pos', 'her2_pos', 'pik3ca']: diff=-0.474 (p=0.0017, n_t=224); ['pr_pos', 'brain_mets', 'low_alb']: diff=-0.468 (p=0.02, n_t=159); ['pik3ca_wt', 'brain_mets', 'high_ki67']: diff=+0.464 (p=0.011, n_t=163). No additional positive subgroup beyond BRCA-mut is identified.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multi-feature subgroup involving has_brain_mets=1 AND low ki67_pct exists in which treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases pfs_months by ~0.4-0.7 months.
No 2-/3-feature subgroup exists in which treatment_pembrolizumab significantly increases pfs_months; effects are null or slightly negative across all candidate subgroups.

analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab top subgroups by |diff|: ['er_pos', 'brain_mets', 'low_ki67']: diff=+0.723 (p=0.003, n_t=169); ['pik3ca_wt', 'brain_mets', 'low_ki67']: diff=+0.616 (p=0.014, n_t=161); ['her2_neg', 'brain_mets', 'low_ki67']: diff=+0.564 (p=0.011, n_t=194); ['pr_pos', 'pik3ca_wt', 'brain_mets']: diff=+0.475 (p=0.04, n_t=168); ['her2_pos', 'pik3ca', 'low_ki67']: diff=+0.440 (p=0.023, n_t=153). Multiple subgroups containing brain_mets+low_ki67 reach diff +0.4-0.7 mo (p~0.003-0.05). Pattern is consistent across er_pos/her2_neg/pik3ca_wt variants of the brain_mets+low_ki67 backbone.

Pembrolizumab top subgroups by |diff|: ['er_neg', 'pr_pos', 'low_ki67']: diff=-0.459 (p=0.0058, n_t=181); ['pr_pos', 'ecog2', 'low_ki67']: diff=-0.448 (p=0.0011, n_t=391); ['pik3ca_wt', 'ecog2', 'low_alb']: diff=-0.429 (p=0.002, n_t=338); ['ecog2', 'low_ki67', 'low_alb']: diff=-0.427 (p=0.006, n_t=254); ['pr_neg', 'brain_mets', 'postmeno']: diff=-0.427 (p=0.022, n_t=175). All top results are negative (treatment associated with shorter PFS), concentrated in ECOG=2/low-Ki67/low-albumin (frail) patients. No positive subgroup is observed.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The exhaustive 2-/3-feature search confirms that treatment_palbociclib produces its largest pfs_months benefits (diff > 3 mo) in subgroups that combine pik3ca_wt AND low ki67_pct, with additional gain from er_positive=1, pr_positive=1, and her2_negative.
A small positive subgroup for treatment_tamoxifen exists in brca1_mutation=1 patients (diff ~0.4-0.5 mo), though it is borderline after multiple testing.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib top subgroups by |diff|: ['er_pos', 'pik3ca_wt', 'low_ki67']: diff=+4.078 (p=0, n_t=3976); ['pr_pos', 'pik3ca_wt', 'low_ki67']: diff=+3.892 (p=0, n_t=3615); ['her2_low', 'pik3ca_wt', 'low_ki67']: diff=+3.596 (p=0, n_t=2089); ['her2_neg', 'pik3ca_wt', 'low_ki67']: diff=+3.520 (p=0, n_t=4588); ['er_pos', 'her2_low', 'low_ki67']: diff=+3.259 (p=0, n_t=2301). The 'pik3ca_wt + low_ki67' backbone repeatedly produces +2.9 mo+ effects, with up to +4.1 mo when combined with ER+/PR+/HER2-low.

Tamoxifen top subgroups by |diff|: ['brca1', 'pik3ca_wt', 'stage_lt4']: diff=+0.510 (p=0.03, n_t=159); ['her2_neg', 'brca1', 'pik3ca_wt']: diff=+0.501 (p=0.03, n_t=191); ['brca1', 'no_brain', 'low_ki67']: diff=+0.496 (p=0.035, n_t=169); ['her2_neg', 'brca1', 'stage_lt4']: diff=+0.487 (p=0.012, n_t=224); ['pr_pos', 'her2_neg', 'brca1']: diff=+0.470 (p=0.028, n_t=217). BRCA1+ER+ subgroup confirmation: diff=+0.294 (p=0.12). Borderline signal, not robust to multiple testing.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab benefit on pfs_months is larger in HER2+/ER- (HER2-driven, non-luminal) patients than in HER2+/ER+ patients.

analyses.result_summary: HER2+ ER- trastuzumab effect: diff=-0.063 (p=0.55, n_t=563); HER2+ ER+ effect: diff=-0.087 (p=0.18). Both null. Trastuzumab does not appear to confer a PFS benefit in any HER2-defined subgroup of this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_palbociclib increases pfs_months by ~5 months relative to no palbociclib in the joint subgroup defined by er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0 AND pr_positive=1 AND ki67_pct < median (~14.6%). Outside this subgroup the palbociclib effect is small (~+0.35 mo).

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup palbociclib effect (ER+/HER2-/PIK3CAwt/PR+/lowKi67): diff=+5.010 mo (p=0, n_t=2798, n_u=5119). Complement subgroup palbo effect: diff=+0.350 mo (p=3.7e-48). The treatment-effect heterogeneity is dramatic (subgroup vs complement diff ~4.7 mo).

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases pfs_months by ~0.4 months in the subgroup defined by has_brain_mets=1 AND ki67_pct < median; effect is null elsewhere.
FINAL: treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months by ~0.35 months in the subgroup defined by brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1; effect is null in BRCA-wild-type patients.

analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab in brain_mets + low_ki67: diff=+0.433 (p=0.025, n_t=239); adjusted interaction coef=+0.304 (p=0.00017).
Olaparib in BRCA1+ or BRCA2+: diff=+0.346 (p=0.041, n_t=239); BRCA-wt diff=-0.056 (p=0.14). Adjusted-interaction not significant (p=0.59); the BRCA-mut subgroup signal is borderline.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_trastuzumab has no clinically meaningful main effect or subgroup effect on pfs_months in this cohort, including in the her2_positive=1 subgroup.

FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab has no positive subgroup effect on pfs_months in this cohort; in subgroups defined by frailty markers (ecog_ps=2 + low_alb + low_ki67) the association is mildly negative.

FINAL: treatment_tamoxifen has no robust pfs_months benefit on the cohort or in canonical ER+/postmenopausal subgroups; a borderline positive signal in BRCA1+ patients is likely chance after multiple-testing correction.

analyses.result_summary: Best HER2-stratified trastuzumab estimates: HER2+ diff=-0.079 (p=0.15); HER2+/ER- diff=-0.063; HER2+/ER+ diff=-0.087. None reach significance.

Best pembrolizumab subgroup (TNBC + brain_mets) diff=-0.089 (p=0.63); TNBC + high Ki67 + high LDH diff=-0.043 (p=0.69); top 3-feature subgroups all negative (smallest p=0.0058 for ['er_neg', 'pr_pos', 'low_ki67'] with diff=-0.459).
Tamoxifen overall diff=+0.043 (p=0.077); ER+ diff=+0.023 (p=0.45); ER+/postmeno diff=+0.010; BRCA1+/ER+ diff=+0.294 (p=0.12). No robust positive subgroup.
